title: voyria aurantiaca
intro: Voyria aurantiaca, also known as the golden monkey flower or the golden monkey, is a species of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Voyria aurantiaca include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in herbal medicine. Voyria aurantiaca can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of health issues.
